name: forest
hints: Most directions loop back to the same forest. Try interacting with the trees or going EAST.
You can climb trees here. Also, EAST leads to the sunny meadow where the adventure really begins.
GO TREE or CLIMB TREE to reach the top of an oak for a scenic view. Go EAST to reach the meadow.
CLIMB TREE to reach the oak treetop (room 28). Go EAST to the sunny meadow (room 23). N, S, W all loop back here.

effects:
Message: Try --> `LOOK, JUMP, SWIM, CLIMB, FIND, TAKE, SCORE, DROP`
and any other verbs you can think of...

notes: Starting room of Adventureland. Most directions loop back here. EAST goes to the sunny meadow (room 23). CLIMB/GO TREE reaches the oak treetop (room 28) for a view. The real starting area - explore EAST first.
